message:
feat(figma): add design tokens extraction and export operations

Add three new Figma operations for design system tooling:
- figma.styles.list: extract design tokens (colors, typography, spacing)
- figma.styles.export: export tokens as JSON/CSS variables
- figma.variables.list: list Figma variables and collections

Includes token normalization (color hex, typography, spacing), CSS
variable generation, provenance/taint metadata on all responses,
typed structs (DesignToken, FigmaVariable, VariableCollection),
and comprehensive integration tests with mock API responses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -515,6 +515,148 @@ related = [
     "figma.get_file_components",
 ]
 
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Operations: Design Tokens
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+[provides.operations."figma.styles.list"]
+description = "List file styles as structured design tokens with categories and normalized names"
+capability = "figma.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.styles.list".rate_limit]
+max = 30
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."figma.styles.list".input_schema]
+required = ["file_key"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.styles.list".input_schema.properties.file_key]
+description = "Figma file key"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.styles.list".output_schema]
+required = ["tokens", "count"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.styles.list".output_schema.properties.tokens]
+description = "Array of structured design tokens with normalized names and typed values"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.styles.list".output_schema.properties.count]
+description = "Number of tokens extracted"
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.styles.list".output_schema.properties.provenance]
+description = "Data provenance metadata"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.styles.list".output_schema.properties.taint]
+description = "Taint flags for data classification"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.styles.list".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.figma.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."figma.styles.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "List all design tokens from a file's published styles. Returns structured tokens with normalized names and categorized values."
+common_mistakes = ["Using get_file_styles when you want structured tokens — use styles.list instead."]
+examples = ['{"file_key": "abc123DEF456"}']
+related = ["figma.tokens.export", "figma.get_file_styles"]
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export"]
+description = "Export design tokens as JSON or CSS custom properties with naming normalization and stable sorted output"
+capability = "figma.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".rate_limit]
+max = 30
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".input_schema]
+required = ["file_key"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".input_schema.properties.file_key]
+description = "Figma file key"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".input_schema.properties.format]
+description = "Output format: json or css"
+type = "string"
+enum = ["json", "css"]
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".input_schema.properties.prefix]
+description = "CSS custom property prefix (e.g., 'ds' produces --ds-color-primary)"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".input_schema.properties.categories]
+description = "Filter to specific categories: color, typography, effect, grid"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".output_schema]
+required = ["output", "format", "count"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".output_schema.properties.output]
+description = "Exported tokens in the requested format (JSON string or CSS string)"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".output_schema.properties.format]
+description = "The format used for export"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".output_schema.properties.count]
+description = "Number of tokens exported"
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".output_schema.properties.provenance]
+description = "Data provenance metadata"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".output_schema.properties.taint]
+description = "Taint flags for data classification"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.figma.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."figma.tokens.export".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Export design tokens in a consumable format (JSON for code, CSS for stylesheets). Normalizes names and produces stable, sorted output."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Not specifying format — defaults to json.",
+    "Using css format for typography tokens — CSS custom properties work best for colors.",
+]
+examples = [
+    '{"file_key": "abc123DEF456", "format": "json"}',
+    '{"file_key": "abc123DEF456", "format": "css", "prefix": "ds"}',
+    '{"file_key": "abc123DEF456", "format": "json", "categories": ["color"]}',
+]
+related = ["figma.styles.list", "figma.get_file_styles"]
+
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 # Operations: Image Export
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@@ -1173,6 +1315,8 @@ scope = "instance"
 "figma.get_file_nodes" = ["figma.read"]
 "figma.get_file_components" = ["figma.read"]
 "figma.get_file_styles" = ["figma.read"]
+"figma.styles.list" = ["figma.read"]
+"figma.tokens.export" = ["figma.read"]
 "figma.export_images" = ["figma.export"]
 "figma.list_file_versions" = ["figma.read"]
 "figma.list_comments" = ["figma.read"]

@@ -90,6 +90,85 @@ pub struct StylesResponse {
     pub meta: serde_json::Value,
 }
 
+// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Design Tokens
+// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/// A normalized design token extracted from Figma styles.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct DesignToken {
+    /// Normalized token name (kebab-case, e.g. "color-primary-500").
+    pub name: String,
+    /// Original Figma style name before normalization.
+    pub original_name: String,
+    /// Token category: "color", "typography", "effect", "grid".
+    pub category: String,
+    /// The Figma style type (FILL, TEXT, EFFECT, GRID).
+    pub style_type: String,
+    /// The resolved token value.
+    pub value: TokenValue,
+    /// Figma node ID for this style (e.g. "1:2").
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub node_id: Option<String>,
+    /// Description from Figma style metadata.
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub description: Option<String>,
+}
+
+/// Resolved value for a design token.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+#[serde(tag = "type")]
+pub enum TokenValue {
+    /// RGBA color value.
+    #[serde(rename = "color")]
+    Color {
+        r: f64,
+        g: f64,
+        b: f64,
+        a: f64,
+        /// Hex representation (e.g. "#ff5500ff").
+        hex: String,
+    },
+    /// Typography token with font properties.
+    #[serde(rename = "typography")]
+    Typography {
+        font_family: String,
+        font_size: f64,
+        font_weight: f64,
+        line_height: Option<f64>,
+        letter_spacing: Option<f64>,
+    },
+    /// Effect token (shadows, blurs).
+    #[serde(rename = "effect")]
+    Effect {
+        effect_type: String,
+        #[serde(default)]
+        radius: Option<f64>,
+        #[serde(default)]
+        color: Option<String>,
+        #[serde(default)]
+        offset_x: Option<f64>,
+        #[serde(default)]
+        offset_y: Option<f64>,
+    },
+    /// Grid layout token.
+    #[serde(rename = "grid")]
+    Grid {
+        pattern: String,
+        #[serde(default)]
+        size: Option<f64>,
+        #[serde(default)]
+        gutter: Option<f64>,
+        #[serde(default)]
+        count: Option<f64>,
+    },
+    /// Raw fallback for unrecognized token types.
+    #[serde(rename = "raw")]
+    Raw {
+        data: serde_json::Value,
+    },
+}
+
 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 // Image Export
 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
